mnemonics.title: System Call Steps
mnemonics.content: PVP: Prepare arguments → Validate request → Perform in kernel mode

acronyms.usage: Standard interface for making system calls

visualTips.visualization: Imagine a security checkpoint separating user applications (public area) from kernel (restricted zone)

analogies.analogy: Like ordering food in a restaurant: You (user) give order to waiter (system call) who interacts with kitchen (kernel)
